title: Worktree Registry
description: Schema for .git-worktrees/.registry.json — advisory registry of managed worktrees

agent_id.description: Agent identifier for parallel disambiguation. Null for single-agent worktrees.

branch.description: Git branch name checked out in this worktree

worktree_path.description: Absolute path to the worktree directory

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of worktree creation

last_heartbeat.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last heartbeat

pinned.description: If true, worktree is exempt from garbage collection
